sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current block positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['O', 'b'] and n['id'] in [10, 11]:
        print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check the area around the blocks
ascii_grid = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for r in range(40, 50):
    print(f"Row {r}, cols 18-42: '{ascii_grid[r][18:42]}'")

# Check white cross position
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"White cross: id={n['id']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
